policy: Posts are listed only when there is a source file, public URL, or explicit planned slot. LinkedIn mirrors should include the outbound URL when published.

slots.title: Using coding agents without the fog
slots.summary: How I use agents for speed while keeping source files, checks, and final judgment in human hands.

slots.title: Static sites as workbenches
slots.summary: Why I like this kind of site: simple files, easy inspection, and fewer moving parts than a portfolio stack needs.

slots.title: LinkedIn mirrors
slots.summary: Future LinkedIn posts can be mirrored here with a short local summary and outbound URL.
